info.title: HistoryTalk API
info.description: Vietnamese history educational AI platform — backend REST API

MessageResponse.description: A single chat message (mirrors Java MessageResponse DTO)

content.example: Xin chào! Ta là Nguyễn Du...

ChatSessionResponse.description: A chat session summary (mirrors Java ChatSessionResponse DTO)

title.example: Cuộc trò chuyện với Nguyễn Du

lastMessage.example: Đoạn trường ai có qua cầu mới hay

ChatHistorySessionItem.description: Session item in history list with enriched character/context metadata

contextName.example: Thời kỳ Lê mạt Nguyễn sơ

ChatHistoryGroupResponse.description: Sessions grouped by character (mirrors Java ChatHistoryGroupResponse DTO)

contextId.description: Actually the characterId (field name kept for FE compatibility)

contextName.description: Actually the characterName (field name kept for FE compatibility)

GetMessagesResponse.description: Session messages + suggested questions (mirrors Java GetMessagesResponse DTO)

suggestedQuestions.description: Suggested questions from the last ASSISTANT message
example: Bạn muốn hỏi về tác phẩm nào?

SendMessageResponse.description: Response after sending a message (mirrors Java SendMessageResponse DTO)

remainingTokens.description: User's remaining token balance after this exchange

promptTokens.description: Tokens consumed by the user prompt

completionTokens.description: Tokens consumed by the AI response

post.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair
Sign in or register via Google OAuth ID token
Send a password-reset link to the given email

200.description: Reset email sent (same response whether email exists or not)

post.summary: Reset password using the token from the email link
Attach a character to a historical context

delete.summary: Remove a character from a historical context

get.summary: Get all contexts of a character
Get user's chat history grouped by character
get.description: Returns all non-deleted chat sessions of the authenticated user, grouped by character (mirrors Java ChatHistoryServiceImpl.getHistory()). Each group includes rich character metadata and per-session stats.
Returns sessions for the authenticated user filtered by characterId. contextId is an optional additional filter. Mirrors Java ChatSessionServiceImpl.getSessions() → List<ChatSessionResponse>.

parameters.name: contextId
parameters.description: Optional MongoDB ObjectId of the historical context

post.description: Creates a new chat session and asynchronously generates an AI greeting in the background (fire-and-forget). The greeting is saved to DB but NOT included in the response body — same behaviour as Java BE. Returns ChatSessionResponse immediately after session creation.

get.summary: Get all messages in a session
get.description: Returns all non-deleted messages for the given session, plus suggestedQuestions from the last ASSISTANT message. Mirrors Java MessageServiceImpl.getMessages() → GetMessagesResponse.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the chat session

404.description: Session not found or does not belong to this user

delete.description: Permanently deletes the session and all its messages. Returns HTTP 204 No Content — same as Java BE.

patch.description: Marks the session as deleted (sets deletedAt timestamp) without removing it from DB. Mirrors Java ChatSessionServiceImpl.softDeleteSession().

post.summary: Send a message and receive an AI response
post.description: Primary chat endpoint. Sends a user message, calls the AI service, saves both messages to DB, and returns SendMessageResponse. Includes token usage fields (remainingTokens, promptTokens, completionTokens) — same as Java BE.

content.example: Ông có thể kể về Truyện Kiều không?

messageType.description: VOICE skips suggested questions to save tokens

400.description: Missing fields or out of tokens

post.summary: Send a message and stream the AI response (SSE)
post.description:
Streaming chat endpoint. Response is a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream.
SSE event types: - `text`: `{ "type": "text", "data": "<chunk>" }` - `metadata`: `{ "type": "metadata", "data": { "promptTokens": N, "completionTokens": N, "suggestedQuestions": [...] } }` - `done`: `{ "type": "done", "remainingTokens": N }` — stream ends here - `error`: `{ "type": "error", "message": "..." }`
Mirrors Java MessageServiceImpl.sendMessageStream().

200.description: SSE stream of the AI response

400.description: Missing fields or out of tokens

200.description: Lấy danh sách gói thành công

post.summary: Upload a document for a Historical Context (Staff/Admin only)

201.description: Document created and queued for AI processing

delete.summary: Delete a document (also removes from AI vector store)

post.summary: Upload a document for a Character (Staff/Admin only)

201.description: Document created and queued for AI processing

get.summary: Get a character document by ID

delete.summary: Delete a character document (also removes from AI vector store)

200.description: Historical context active status toggled successfully

post.summary: Create a payment order and PayOS checkout link

200.description: List of active tiers retrieved successfully

post.description: Called by PayOS after a payment event. Not authenticated — trust is established by verifying the HMAC-SHA256 signature in the body.

get.summary: Get one of the current user's completed quiz sessions

parameters.name: limitedTime
parameters.description: Optional session time limit in seconds

get.summary: Get quiz detail with all questions

post.description: Upload a .csv file to bulk-create quizzes (all as drafts, isPublished=false). Rows with the same `title` are grouped into one quiz; each row is one question. Duplicate titles and invalid rows are skipped and reported in `errors[]`. Required CSV columns: title, contextId, level, questionContent, option1, option2, option3, option4, correctAnswer, explanation. Mirrors Java: POST /api/v1/staff/quizzes/import

400.description: Invalid file or missing CSV columns

200.description: Lấy thông tin gói thành công

400.description: Passwords do not match or incorrect current password

get.summary: Get a user by ID (SystemAdmin only)

patch.summary: Restore multiple deactivated users in batch (SystemAdmin only)
patch.description: Restores a list of soft-deleted users. Returns restoredCount, restoredUserIds, and failedUserIds (users that were not found or already active). Mirrors Java: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/restore/batch

400.description: userIds must be a non-empty array

patch.description: Sets deletedAt = null and isActive = true for every soft-deleted user. Returns the count of restored users. Mirrors Java: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/restore/all

message.example: All deactivated users restored successfully (5 users restored)

patch.description: Sets deletedAt on the target user and cascade soft-deletes all their chat sessions, characters, historical contexts, and quiz sessions. Mirrors Java: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{userId}/deactivate

403.description: Forbidden — only SYSTEM_ADMIN may deactivate other users

patch.summary: Restore a single deactivated user (SystemAdmin only)
patch.description: Clears deletedAt and reactivates a soft-deleted user account. Returns 400 if the user is already active. Mirrors Java: PATCH /api/v1/admin/users/{userId}/restore

tags.name: Historical Context Documents
tags.description: Documents attached to a Historical Context (for RAG)

tags.name: Character Documents
tags.description: Documents attached to a Character (for RAG)
